title: Implement SoA (Structure of Arrays) batch layout for GF(p^n) SIMD
description: Implement vertical SIMD batch processing for GF(p^n) using Structure of Arrays layout. Instead of Vec<GfPn>, store coefficients separately (c0: Vec<u64>, c1: Vec<u64>, ...) so SIMD lanes process multiple independent field elements in parallel. The polynomial logic operates at the high level while coefficient arithmetic is vectorized across lanes.
